title: Phase 12 — watchdog stale-warn bead + e2e smoke + asciicast
description: Wire watchdog to author a [fellowship-watchdog] bead on each Stale transition (once per stale-window). Run end-to-end smoke against this fellowship repo on a dummy branch. Capture docs/agentic-ui-demo.cast. Write JOURNAL Phase 12 entry. Plan §6 row 12 + §11 follow-up from Phase 11.

title: Drift telemetry: nudges_received_per_minute per agent
description: Architect review (v0.2.0) flagged that the rust side cannot detect prompt-drift in agents (claude may stop respecting [ping]/[tick] hard interrupts after a model upgrade). Add a per-agent counter exposed in the workspaces pane: nudges_received (we emitted) vs nudges_acted_on_within_5s (derived from heartbeats following a nudge). Pre-mortem item 3 in .omc/plans/agent-comms-resurrection.md called this out.

title: [fellowship-watchdog] agent pm stale
description: Agent `pm` has not produced a heartbeat in over 60s. Watchdog will auto-restart at 180s. Orchestrator may intervene (reassign work, surface to user) before then.

title: Phase 12 demo evidence file
description: Add a single new file `docs/agentic-ui-demo-evidence.md` whose only contents are the line `Phase 12 demo evidence - generated 2026-05-08`. No code changes, no dependencies. Use the `feat/bead-<id>` convention for the branch.

title: Fully delete max_restarts field + decide_watchdog_actions param
description: v0.2.0 left App.max_restarts (set to u32::MAX) and the now-unused _max_restarts param on decide_watchdog_actions to avoid touching 13 test call sites. Remove the field, drop the param, update each test, drop the failed_agents code path if unused. ~30 lines of net deletion.

title: Decide: implement or delete AgentState.assigned_beads + last_bead_cursor_ms
description: Fields declared in src/agents/state.rs:49-53, serialized in JSON, but never populated by rust or by agent prompts. Either wire them in (prompt loop writes cursor.json; recovery prompt fallback in restart_agent reads them) or delete them. See architect review in .omc/state/sessions/265fe895-*/progress.txt.

title: Self-nudge prevention on bus-tick
description: Today an agent can write [from:pm to:pm] notes and touch bus-tick/pm.tick — the AgentNudge handler will inject [ping] back into its own PTY. Add sender attribution (e.g. write to bus-tick/<recipient>.tick.<sender>) and drop self-routed nudges in src/agents/watcher.rs::parse_member_label_from_tick_path.

title: Recovery prompt fallback for missing session_id
description: The plan promised a fallback in restart_agent when session_id is None: spawn fresh with a recovery preface built from notes.md tail + assigned_beads. Currently restart_agent just falls back to a fresh uuid with no recovery preface. Low-priority because pre-generated --session-id makes the missing case rare.
